## Required Artifacts

- [ ] Mode route is explicit
- [ ] Minimum artifacts are created or updated
- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` is updated if execution rules changed
- [ ] `.github/` is updated if collaboration entry changed
- [ ] labels or collaboration defaults are updated if workflow scope changed

## Validation

- [ ] Docs checked
- [ ] Script checked
- [ ] Example or real usage path checked
- [ ] Dry run or command output captured when automation changed
